goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 19:00'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'hotel du vin and bistro'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should arrive by 19:00
The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get price and train ID
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called hotel du vin and bistro
Make sure you get phone number and address
